message:
Restore attestations permission for reusable workflows

The tree-sitter reusable workflows internally require attestations:write
permission, even though attestations isn't a valid input parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ concurrency:
 permissions:
   contents: write
   id-token: write
+  attestations: write
 
 jobs:
   github:
